name: Ultra Sweeper
short_description: Minesweeper puzzle game with multiple game modes
detailed_description: Explore a Minesweeper-style game with a twist, featuring four game modes: Normal, Honeycomb, Pentagon, and Triangular. Each mode offers a different layout, from traditional square grids to complex triangular and polygonal patterns, challenging players to adapt their strategies and uncover hidden mines. Whether you're an experienced player or new to Minesweeper, these diverse modes provide engaging gameplay for all skill levels.
about_the_game: Explore a Minesweeper-style game with a twist, featuring four game modes: Normal, Honeycomb, Pentagon, and Triangular. Each mode offers a different layout, from traditional square grids to complex triangular and polygonal patterns, challenging players to adapt their strategies and uncover hidden mines. Whether you're an experienced player or new to Minesweeper, these diverse modes provide engaging gameplay for all skill levels.
supported_languages: English, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Turkish
